title: Hide Invisible Armor
body:
![](https://i.imgur.com/1WhuY6q.png) ![](https://i.imgur.com/VniXNq0.png)

This simple and straightforward clientside mod that makes armor vanish along with the entity/player wearing it while under invisibility effects.

This mod should be compatible with practically any armor that uses the 'renderArmor' class, and even invisibility effects from other mods.
